safeAnnouncement: GCA is live on Base Mainnet as a fixed-supply ERC-20 token.

Positioning: Narrative meets risk control. GCA connects Go China Access, China Narrative Radar, Liquidation Replay, ENTRY_READY Review, GCA Member Club, and Risk First Trading.

firstPostText: GCA is building Go China Access.
A fixed-supply Base token connecting the China macro story with future non-custodial quant risk tools, market education, and member access.
Not custody. No return promises. Not financial advice.
threadFollowUpDrafts: Weekly Go China Radar 003 is live: Public Activity Without Artificial Volume. Verify first: Base Mainnet contract, official GCA/USDT route, wallet evidence, market-quality boundaries, risk notes, and member utility readiness. https://gcagochina.com/radar.html Not financial advice.

GCA is building around Go China Access, China Narrative Radar, Liquidation Replay, ENTRY_READY Review, GCA Member Club, and risk-first Web3 education. Roadmap: https://gcagochina.com/roadmap.html Weekly Radar: https://gcagochina.com/radar.html

Risk notes: GCA is on Base Mainnet only. No third-party audit has been completed. Liquidity is starter-depth only. Owner observed no wallet risk warning visible on 2026-05-14; this is not security-vendor approval. Check the verification page before using any link or pool.
pinnedPostDraft: Base Mainnet only. No third-party audit. Starter-depth liquidity.
postingChecklist: Confirm the website field points to https://gcagochina.com.
Use the GCA logo asset before posting if the profile photo is still blank.
Pin only the official links post after it is live.
Do not post market-price claims, external audit claims, warning-removal claims, or listing-approval claims.

moderatorReplyTemplates.walletWarning: A Blockaid / MetaMask false-positive report was submitted on 2026-05-10. The owner observed no wallet risk warning visible on 2026-05-14, but this is not permanent security-vendor approval. Verify the contract, pool, and official links before taking any action.
moderatorReplyTemplates.priceDisplay: Wallets and data platforms decide when to index prices. The official market route is GCA/USDT on Base Mainnet, and current liquidity remains starter-depth only.
moderatorReplyTemplates.memberAccess: The member flow currently creates local packets and support context. Public self-service claiming starts only after controlled HTTPS account UI and read-only wallet verification are live.
moderatorReplyTemplates.auditStatus: No third-party audit has been completed. Internal review is not the same as an independent audit.

doNotPost: BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
security-vendor approval, permanent warning-free status, or cross-wallet warning removal before vendor/current wallet UI confirms it
third-party audit completion before an independent report is published
deep liquidity, price support, listing approval, or trading outcomes
requests for private keys, seed phrases, exchange API secrets, withdrawal permission, one-time codes, custody, or fund transfers
